trusted_baseline.commit_semantics: verified live main head before the canonical-workspace-governance branch was created; live Git determines the current head

completed_increments.title: Add collector image drift guard and read-only migration plan
Add HELIX retrieval and archive governance
Refresh project state after governance merges

workstreams.write_owner: ChatGPT project: ServiceTracer — Governed Azure Operations Lab
workstreams.scope: Encode and validate the six canonical workspace streams in .project metadata and repository orientation only. Permitted paths: .project/active-work.json, .project/workstream-catalog.json, .project/README.md, .project/validate.py, and README.md.
workstreams.next_gate: Require PR #24 CI success, review the catalog wording and claim boundaries, and keep the pull request in draft until those checks are complete. No Azure workflow dispatch or resource mutation is authorized.

known_open_pull_requests.title: feat: scaffold Azure network foundation
known_open_pull_requests.action: Do not treat as current implementation work. Review for unique durable evidence, then close as superseded through a separate explicit action.

required_gates: pre-maintenance guest service and evidence-mount verification
verified evidence-disk recovery point before destructive action
explicit NIC preservation or deterministic recreation contract
new managed-identity and RBAC restoration contract

next_bounded_operation.next_gate: After the canonical workspace increment is merged and ownership is released, design and test a separate replacement-execution branch without dispatching it. Execution remains prohibited until independent review and explicit human authorization.
